stemHtml: Which of the following statements is correct with regards to aircraft certified under CS-23 and CS-25?

options.a: Only jet aeroplanes have a V<sub>MO</sub>.
options.b: V<sub>NE</sub> applies to all aircraft with an MTOW less than 5 670 kg.
options.c: V<sub>NE</sub> only applies to CS-23 aircraft but NOT to CS-25 aircraft.
options.d: V<sub>MO</sub> only applies to CS-25 aircraft but NOT to CS-23 aircraft.
